parameterization: negative binomial with mean mu and dispersion k: Var(T | mu) = mu + mu^2 / k

primaryFit.basis: settlement: all completed finals including extra innings; forfeits and rain-shortened (under 51 outs) games excluded
primaryFit.method: moment decomposition with the Jensen term retained: k = (mean^2 + Var(lines)) / (Var(T) - Var(lines) - mean), with Var(T) and mean from Retrosheet finals and Var(lines) from our captured closing totals

closeSpread.source: production closing_lines capture (MLB totals, polygon network) over the public anon read path

knownApproximations: closing line used as the market mean; price-implied skew ignored
close-spread window (May-Jul 2026) vs fit window (2023-2025 full seasons): era and seasonal-coverage mismatch
closing-line sample variance includes market noise and 0.5-run quantization, over-subtracting Var(mu)
a smooth NB cannot reproduce the odd/even parity oscillation of MLB totals (see marginalPmfCheck)
dispersion k assumed constant across means
walk-off truncation is absorbed into the marginal, not modeled
refitPlan: TOTALS_V1: maximum-likelihood refit on in-house (closing total, prices, final) pairs conditional on the close-implied mean, same reference feed, once pairs reach a workable n (~300, expected mid-August 2026); ladder_version distinguishes the two and history recomputes
